title: Pure Black Sky - Hypixel SkyBlock Gadget
description: Make the sky black instead of blindingly bright especially when harvesting sunflowers.
body:
### Note
This mod requires Mod Menu and YetAnotherConfigLib(YACL) to open config screen
### Pure Black Sky
Harvesting sunflowers in hypixel skyblock garden requires the world time set to day. However, it becomes too bright in your monitor when you are doing a long grind. This mod gives an option to toggle the sky color between normal and pure black in config screen.
